vibe: Deep house grooves, ambient electronics, Japanese city pop, jazz fusion, and shoegaze textures

tracks.name: Awake
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Boards of Canada — warm ambient post-rock electronics with lush synth textures

tracks.name: Archangel
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Aphex Twin — spectral UK garage atmospherics, crackled vinyl warmth

tracks.name: SPORTS MEN (2018 Yoshinori Sunahara Remastering)
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Ryuichi Sakamoto and city pop — Hosono's electronic funk from the YMO universe

tracks.name: The Daisy
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Four Tet and Floating Points — lo-fi house warmth with breakbeat sensibility

tracks.name: It Runs Through Me (feat. De La Soul)
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Nujabes and FKJ — jazzy guitar grooves meet hip-hop soul

tracks.name: Glue
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Peggy Gou and &ME — euphoric melodic techno with nostalgic vocal chops

tracks.name: Space 5
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Yussef Dayes — modular synth meets spiritual jazz, cosmic harp explorations

tracks.name: Red Room
tracks.reason: Adjacent to BADBADNOTGOOD and Khruangbin — future soul with glitchy neo-jazz fusion

tracks.name: Drop
tracks.reason: Adjacent to Toshiki Kadomatsu and Taeko Onuki — Shibuya-kei precision meets experimental pop

tracks.name: Loud Places
tracks.reason: Adjacent to New Order and Slowdive — blissed-out dancefloor nostalgia with Romy's vocal shimmer
